26758.zh_title: 扩大私立学校选择项目对公立学校学生的影响
26758.authors: David N. Figlio, Cassandra M.D. Hart, Krzysztof Karbownik
26758.abstract: Using a rich dataset that merges student-level school records with birth records, and a student fixed effect design, we explore how the massive scale-up of a Florida private school choice program affected public school students’ outcomes. Expansion of the program produced modestly larger benefits for students attending public schools that had a larger initial degree of private school options, measured prior to the introduction of the voucher program. These benefits include higher standardized test scores and lower absenteeism and suspension rates. Effects are particularly pronounced for lower-income students, but results are positive for more affluent students as well.
26758.zh_abstract: 利用一个将学生层面的学校记录与出生记录相结合、并采用学生固定效应设计的丰富数据集，我们探讨了佛罗里达州一个私立学校选择项目的大规模推广如何影响公立学校学生的结果。该项目的扩展为那些在引入代金券项目之前初始私立学校选择程度较大（以该指标衡量）的公立学校的学生带来了适度更大的益处。这些益处包括更高的标准化考试成绩以及更低的缺勤率和停学率。对于低收入学生，影响尤为显著，但对较富裕的学生也有积极结果。

26757.title: Social Groups and the Effectiveness of Protests
26757.zh_title: 社会群体与抗议的有效性
26757.authors: Marco Battaglini, Rebecca B. Morton, Eleonora Patacchini
26757.abstract: We present an informational theory of public protests, according to which public protests allow citizens to aggregate privately dispersed information and signal it to the policy maker. The model predicts that information sharing of signals within social groups can facilitate information aggregation when the social groups are sufficiently large even when it is not predicted with individual signals. We use experiments in the laboratory and on Amazon Mechanical Turk to test these predictions. We find that information sharing in social groups significantly affects citizens' protest decisions and as a consequence mitigates the effects of high conflict, leading to greater efficiency in policy makers' choices. Our experiments highlight that social media can play an important role in protests beyond simply a way in which citizens can coordinate their actions; and indeed that the information aggregation and the coordination motives behind public protests are intimately connected and cannot be conceptually separated.
26757.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个关于公众抗议的信息理论，根据该理论，公众抗议允许公民汇总私下分散的信息，并将其信号传递给政策制定者。该模型预测，当社会群体足够大时，群体内部的信息共享可以促进信息汇总，即使个体信号无法实现这一点。我们通过实验室实验和亚马逊土耳其机器人实验来检验这些预测。我们发现，社会群体中的信息共享显著影响公民的抗议决策，并因此缓解了高度冲突的影响，从而提高了政策制定者选择的效率。我们的实验强调，社交媒体在抗议中可能发挥重要作用，而不仅仅是公民协调行动的一种方式；事实上，公众抗议背后的信息汇总和协调动机是紧密相连的，在概念上无法分离。

26756.title: The Limits of onetary Economics: On Money as a Latent Medium of Exchange
26756.zh_title: 货币经济学的局限：论货币作为潜在交换媒介
26756.abstract: We formulate a generalization of the traditional medium-of-exchange function of money in contexts where there is imperfect competition in the intermediation of credit, settlement, or payment services used to conduct transactions. We ﬁnd that the option to settle transactions with money strengthens the stance of sellers of goods and services vis-à-vis intermediaries, and show this mechanism is operative even for sellers who never exercise the option to sell for cash. These latent money demand considerations imply that in general, in contrast to current conventional wisdom in policy-oriented research in monetary economics, monetary policy remains eﬀective through medium-of-exchange transmission channels—even in highly developed credit economies where the share of monetary transactions is negligible.
26756.zh_abstract: 我们在信贷、结算或支付服务中介存在不完全竞争的交易环境中，对货币的传统交换媒介功能进行了概括。我们发现，用货币结算交易的选择增强了商品和服务卖方相对于中介机构的地位，并表明即使对于从未行使过现金销售选择权的卖方，这一机制也起作用。这些潜在的货币需求考虑意味着，总体而言，与当前货币政策导向研究中货币经济学的传统观点相反，货币政策通过交换媒介传导渠道仍然有效——即使在货币交易份额微不足道的高度发达的信用经济中也是如此。

26755.title: Can Investors Time Their Exposure to Private Equity?
26755.zh_title: 投资者能否把握私募股权投资的时机？
26755.authors: Gregory Brown, Robert S. Harris, Wendy Hu, Tim Jenkinson, Steven N. Kaplan, David T. Robinson
26755.abstract: Private equity performance, both for buyouts and venture capital, has been highly cyclical: periods of high fundraising have been followed by periods of low performance. Despite this seemingly predictable variation, we find modest gains, at best, to pursuing realistic, investable strategies that time capital commitments to private equity. This occurs, in part, because investors can only time their commitments to funds; they cannot time when commitments are called or when investments are exited. There is a high degree of time-series correlation in net cash flows even across commitment strategies that allocate capital in a very different manner over time.
26755.zh_abstract: 私募股权（包括收购和风险投资）的业绩具有高度周期性：高募资期之后往往伴随着低业绩期。尽管存在这种看似可预测的波动，我们发现，追求现实且可投资的策略来把握私募股权资本承诺的时机，最多只能带来适度的收益。这在一定程度上是因为投资者只能把握对基金的承诺时机；他们无法把握资本被调用或投资退出的时机。即使在不同时期以截然不同的方式配置资本的承诺策略之间，净现金流也存在高度的时间序列相关性。

26754.title: Historical Natural Experiments: Bridging Economics and Economic History
26754.zh_title: 历史自然实验：连接经济学与经济史
26754.abstract: The analysis of historical natural experiments has profoundly impacted economics research across fields. We trace the development and increasing application of the methodology, both from the perspective of economic historians and from the perspective of economists in other subdisciplines. We argue that the historical natural experiment represents a methodological bridge between economic history and other fields: historians are able to use the cutting edge identification strategies emphasized by applied microeconomists; economists across subfields are able to scour history for useful identifying variation; development and growth economists are able to trace the historical roots of contemporary outcomes. Differences in fields suggest differences in scholars' aims of studying historical natural experiments. We propose a taxonomy of three primary motives that reflect priorities in different fields: historians aim to understand causal processes within specific settings. Economists across fields aim to identify "clean" historical events (in whatever context) to test hypotheses of theoretical interest or estimate causal parameters. And, growth and development economists aim to identify past variation that can be causally linked to contemporary outcomes of interest. We summarize important contributions made by research in each category. Finally, we close with a brief discussion of challenges facing each category of work.
26754.zh_abstract: 历史自然实验的分析深刻影响了经济学各领域的研究。我们追溯了该方法的发展及其日益广泛的应用，既从经济史学家的角度，也从其他子学科经济学家的角度。我们认为，历史自然实验代表了经济史与其他领域之间的方法论桥梁：历史学家能够利用应用微观经济学家强调的前沿识别策略；各领域的经济学家能够从历史中寻找有用的识别变异；发展经济学家和增长经济学家能够追溯当代结果的历史根源。领域的差异表明学者研究历史自然实验的目的不同。我们提出了一个分类法，包含反映不同领域优先级的三种主要动机：历史学家旨在理解特定背景下的因果过程。各领域的经济学家旨在识别“干净的”历史事件（无论何种背景），以检验理论感兴趣的假设或估计因果参数。增长和发展经济学家旨在识别能够与感兴趣的当代结果建立因果联系的过去变异。我们总结了每一类研究的重要贡献。最后，我们简要讨论了每类工作面临的挑战。
26754.meta: Programs：DAE, DEV, LS, POL；JEL：B00, N00, N01, N10, O10

26753.title: Central Bank Digital Currency: Central Banking For All?
26753.zh_title: 央行数字货币：面向所有人的中央银行？
26753.authors: Jesús Fernández-Villaverde, Daniel Sanches, Linda Schilling, Harald Uhlig
26753.abstract: The introduction of a central bank digital currency (CBDC) allows the central bank to engage in large-scale intermediation by competing with private financial intermediaries for deposits. Yet, since a central bank is not an investment expert, it cannot invest in long-term projects itself, but relies on investment banks to do so. We derive an equivalence result that shows that absent a banking panic, the set of allocations achieved with private financial intermediation will also be achieved with a CBDC. During a panic, however, we show that the rigidity of the central bank's contract with the investment banks has the capacity to deter runs. Thus, the central bank is more stable than the commercial banking sector. Depositors internalize this feature ex-ante, and the central bank arises as a deposit monopolist, attracting all deposits away from the commercial banking sector. This monopoly might endangered maturity transformation.
26753.zh_abstract: 引入央行数字货币允许中央银行通过与私人金融中介机构竞争存款来从事大规模中介活动。然而，由于中央银行并非投资专家，它本身无法投资于长期项目，而是依赖投资银行来这样做。我们推导出一个等价性结果，表明在没有银行恐慌的情况下，通过私人金融中介实现的配置集合也将通过央行数字货币实现。然而，在恐慌期间，我们表明中央银行与投资银行合同的刚性有能力阻止挤兑。因此，中央银行比商业银行部门更稳定。存款人事前内化了这一特征，中央银行成为存款垄断者，从商业银行部门吸引所有存款。这种垄断可能危及期限转换。

26752.title: Stagnation and Scientific Incentives
26752.abstract: New ideas no longer fuel economic growth the way they once did. A popular explanation for stagnation is that good ideas are harder to find, rendering slowdown inevitable. We present a simple model of the lifecycle of scientific ideas that points to changes in scientist incentives as the cause of scientific stagnation. Over the last five decades, citations have become the dominant way to evaluate scientific contributions and scientists. This emphasis on citations in the measurement of scientific productivity shifted scientist rewards and behavior on the margin toward incremental science and away from exploratory projects that are more likely to fail, but which are the fuel for future breakthroughs. As attention given to new ideas decreased, science stagnated. We also explore ways to broaden how scientific productivity is measured and rewarded, involving both academic search engines such as Google Scholar measuring which contributions explore newer ideas and university administrators and funding agencies utilizing these new metrics in research evaluation. We demonstrate empirically that measures of novelty are correlated with but distinct from measures of scientific impact, which suggests that if also novelty metrics were utilized in scientist evaluation, scientists might pursue more innovative, riskier, projects.
26752.zh_abstract: 新思想不再像过去那样推动经济增长。对停滞的一种流行解释是，好想法更难找到，使得放缓不可避免。我们提出了一个科学思想生命周期的简单模型，指出科学家激励的变化是科学停滞的原因。在过去的五十年里，引用已成为评估科学贡献和科学家的主要方式。这种在衡量科学生产力时对引用的强调，在边际上改变了科学家的奖励和行为，使其转向渐进式科学，远离那些更可能失败但却是未来突破动力的探索性项目。随着对新思想的关注减少，科学停滞了。我们还探讨了如何拓宽衡量和奖励科学生产力的方式，涉及学术搜索引擎（如谷歌学术）衡量哪些贡献探索了更新颖的思想，以及大学管理人员和资助机构在研究评估中利用这些新指标。我们实证表明，新颖性度量与科学影响力度量相关但不同，这表明如果在科学家评估中也使用新颖性指标，科学家可能会追求更具创新性、风险更高的项目。

26751.title: Drug Firms' Payments and Physicians' Prescribing Behavior in Medicare Part D
26751.zh_title: 药品公司支付与医生在医疗保险D部分的处方行为
26751.authors: Colleen Carey, Ethan M.J. Lieber, Sarah Miller
26751.abstract: In a pervasive but controversial practice, drug firms frequently make monetary or in-kind payments to physicians in the course of promoting prescription drugs. We use a federal database on the universe of such payments between 2013 and 2015 linked to prescribing behavior in Medicare Part D. We account for the targeting of payments with fixed effects for each physician-drug combination. In an event study, we show that physicians increase prescribing of drugs for which they receive payments in the months just after payment receipt, with no evidence of differential trends between paid and unpaid physicians prior to the payment. Next, we examine five case studies of major drugs going off patent. Physicians receiving payments from the firms experiencing the patent expiry transition their patients just as quickly to generics as physicians who do not receive such payments. In addition, using hand-collected efficacy data on three major therapeutic classes, we show that drug quality is largely unaffected by the receipt of payments.
26751.zh_abstract: 在一个普遍但有争议的实践中，药品公司在推广处方药时经常向医生进行金钱或实物支付。我们使用一个联邦数据库，该数据库包含2013年至2015年间此类支付的全部记录，并与医疗保险D部分的处方行为相关联。我们通过每个医生-药物组合的固定效应来解释支付的目标定位。在一项事件研究中，我们表明，医生在收到支付后的几个月内，会增加对其收到支付的药物的处方量，而在支付之前，受支付和未受支付的医生之间没有差异趋势的证据。接下来，我们考察了五种主要药物专利到期的案例研究。经历专利到期的公司向医生支付款项，这些医生将患者转向仿制药的速度与未收到此类支付的医生一样快。此外，利用手工收集的三个主要治疗类别的疗效数据，我们表明药物质量基本上不受收到支付的影响。

26750.title: An Exploration of Trend-Cycle Decomposition Methodologies in Simulated Data
26750.zh_title: 模拟数据中趋势-周期分解方法的探索
26750.abstract: This paper uses simulations to explore the properties of the HP filter of Hodrick and Prescott (1997), the BK filter of Baxter and King (1999), and the H filter of Hamilton (2018) that are designed to decompose a univariate time series into trend and cyclical components. Each simulated time series approximates the natural logarithms of U.S. Real GDP, and they are a random walk, an ARIMA model, two unobserved components models, and models with slowly changing nonstationary stochastic trends and definitive cyclical components. In basic time series, the H filter dominates the HP and BK filters in more closely characterizing the underlying framework, but in more complex models, the reverse is true.
26750.zh_abstract: 本文使用模拟来探索Hodrick和Prescott（1997）的HP滤波器、Baxter和King（1999）的BK滤波器以及Hamilton（2018）的H滤波器的性质，这些滤波器旨在将单变量时间序列分解为趋势和周期成分。每个模拟时间序列近似于美国实际GDP的自然对数，它们分别是随机游走、ARIMA模型、两个不可观测成分模型，以及具有缓慢变化的非平稳随机趋势和明确周期成分的模型。在基本时间序列中，H滤波器在更准确地刻画基础框架方面优于HP和BK滤波器，但在更复杂的模型中，情况则相反。

26749.title: Effect of Prescription Opioids and Prescription Opioid Control Policies on Infant Health
26749.zh_title: 处方阿片类药物及处方阿片类药物管控政策对婴儿健康的影响
26749.abstract: Prescription opioid use among women of reproductive age and pregnant women is relatively common. In this article, we examine whether state opioid control policies affected prescription opioid use and, in turn, infant health and maternal behaviors. We conduct several types of analyses including reduced form analyses of the effect of state policies on infant health and maternal behaviors, and instrumental variables analyses of the effects of prescription opioid use on infant health and maternal behaviors. Results from our analysis suggest that reductions in prescription opioid use because of state prescription opioid control policies have improved infant health modestly at the population level with larger implied effects at the individual level.
26749.zh_abstract: 育龄女性和孕妇使用处方阿片类药物的情况相对普遍。本文考察了各州阿片类药物管控政策是否影响了处方阿片类药物的使用，进而影响了婴儿健康和母亲行为。我们进行了多种类型的分析，包括州政策对婴儿健康和母亲行为影响的简化形式分析，以及处方阿片类药物使用对婴儿健康和母亲行为影响的工具变量分析。分析结果表明，由于各州处方阿片类药物管控政策导致的处方阿片类药物使用减少，在人口层面上适度改善了婴儿健康，而在个体层面上则暗示了更大的影响。

26748.title: The Determinants of Income Segregation and Intergenerational Mobility: Using Test Scores to Measure Undermatching
26748.zh_title: 收入隔离与代际流动的决定因素：利用考试成绩衡量匹配不足
26748.authors: Raj Chetty, John N. Friedman, Emmanuel Saez, Nicholas Turner, Danny Yagan
26748.abstract: We analyze how changes in the allocation of students to colleges would affect segregation by parental income across colleges and intergenerational mobility in the United States. We do so by linking data from tax records on parents' incomes and students' earnings outcomes for each college to data on students' SAT and ACT scores. We find that equalizing application, admission, and matriculation rates across parental income groups conditional on test scores would reduce segregation substantially, primarily by increasing the representation of middle-class students at more selective colleges. However, it would have little impact on the fraction of low-income students at elite private colleges because there are relatively few students from low-income families with sufficiently high SAT/ACT scores. Differences in parental income distributions across colleges could be eliminated by giving low and middle-income students a sliding-scale preference in the application and admissions process similar to that implicitly given to legacy students at elite private colleges. Assuming that 80% of observational differences in students' earnings conditional on test scores, race, and parental income are due to colleges' causal effects — a strong assumption, but one consistent with prior work — such changes could reduce intergenerational income persistence among college students by about 25%. We conclude that changing how students are allocated to colleges could substantially reduce segregation and increase intergenerational mobility, even without changing colleges' educational programs.
26748.zh_abstract: 我们分析了学生大学分配方式的变化将如何影响美国大学间按父母收入划分的隔离程度以及代际流动性。为此，我们将来自税务记录的每所大学学生父母收入和学生收入结果的数据，与学生的SAT和ACT成绩数据进行了关联。我们发现，在控制考试成绩的条件下，使不同父母收入群体的申请、录取和入学率均等化，将大幅减少隔离，这主要通过增加中产阶级学生在更具选择性的大学中的代表性来实现。然而，这对精英私立大学中低收入学生的比例影响甚微，因为来自低收入家庭且拥有足够高SAT/ACT分数的学生相对较少。大学间父母收入分布的差异可以通过在申请和录取过程中给予中低收入学生类似于精英私立大学隐性给予校友子女的滑动比例偏好来消除。假设学生收入结果中80%的观测差异（在控制考试成绩、种族和父母收入后）归因于大学的因果效应——这是一个强有力的假设，但与先前研究一致——那么此类变化可使大学生中的代际收入持续性降低约25%。我们得出结论，即使不改变大学的教育项目，改变学生进入大学的分配方式也能大幅减少隔离并增加代际流动性。

26782.title: Media Competition and News Diets
26782.zh_title: 媒体竞争与新闻消费结构
26782.authors: Charles Angelucci, Julia Cagé, Michael Sinkinson
26782.abstract: Technological innovations in content delivery, such as the advent of broadcast television or of the Internet, threaten local newspapers’ ability to bundle their original local content with third-party content such as wire national news. We examine how the entry of television – with its initial focus on national news – affected local newspapers as well as consumer news diets in the United States. We develop a model of local media and show that entry of national television news could reduce the provision of local news. We construct a novel dataset of U.S. newspapers’ economic performance and content choices from 1944 to 1964 and exploit quasi-random variation in the rollout of television to show that this new technology was a negative shock in both the readership and advertising markets for newspapers. Newspapers responded by providing less content, particularly local news. We tie this change towards increasingly nationalized news diets to a decrease in split-ticket voting across Congressional and Presidential elections.
26782.zh_abstract: 内容分发方面的技术创新，例如广播电视或互联网的出现，威胁到地方报纸将其原创本地内容与第三方内容（如通讯社全国新闻）捆绑销售的能力。我们研究了电视的进入（最初侧重于全国新闻）如何影响美国的地方报纸以及消费者的新闻消费结构。我们建立了一个地方媒体模型，并表明全国电视新闻的进入可能会减少地方新闻的提供。我们构建了一个1944年至1964年美国报纸经济表现和内容选择的新数据集，并利用电视推广中的准随机变化来表明，这种新技术对报纸的读者市场和广告市场都造成了负面冲击。报纸的回应是提供更少的内容，尤其是地方新闻。我们将这种向日益全国化新闻消费结构的转变与国会和总统选举中分裂选票的减少联系起来。

26781.title: Votes For Women: An Economic Perspective on Women’s Enfranchisement
26781.zh_title: 女性投票权：女性选举权的经济学视角
26781.abstract: The ratification of the Nineteenth Amendment in 1920 officially granted voting rights to women across the United States. However, many states extended full or partial suffrage to women before the federal amendment. In this paper, we discuss the history of women's enfranchisement using an economic lens. We examine the demand-side, discussing the rise of the women's movement and its alliances with other social movements, and describe how suffragists put pressure on legislators. On the supply side, we draw from theoretical models of suffrage extension to explain why men shared the right to vote with women. Finally, we review empirical studies that attempt to distinguish between competing explanations. We find that no single theory can explain women's suffrage in the US, and note that while the Nineteenth Amendment extended the franchise to women, state-level barriers to voting limited the ability of black women to exercise that right until the Voting Rights Act of 1965.
26781.zh_abstract: 1920年批准的第十九修正案正式赋予美国女性投票权。然而，在联邦修正案之前，许多州已向女性授予了全部或部分选举权。本文从经济学视角探讨女性选举权的历史。我们考察需求侧，讨论女性运动的兴起及其与其他社会运动的联盟，并描述女权主义者如何向立法者施压。在供给侧，我们借鉴选举权扩展的理论模型来解释为何男性与女性分享投票权。最后，我们回顾了试图区分竞争性解释的实证研究。我们发现，没有单一理论能够解释美国的女性选举权，并指出尽管第十九修正案将选举权扩展至女性，但州级投票障碍限制了黑人女性行使该权利的能力，直到1965年《投票权法案》的通过。

26780.title: Cigarette Taxes and Teen Marijuana Use
26780.zh_title: 香烟税与青少年大麻使用
26780.authors: D. Mark Anderson, Kyutaro Matsuzawa, Joseph J. Sabia
26780.abstract: The spillover effect of cigarette taxes on youth marijuana use has been the subject of intense public debate. Opponents of cigarette taxes warn that tax hikes will cause youths to substitute toward marijuana. On the other hand, public health experts often claim that because tobacco is a “gateway” drug, higher cigarette taxes will deter youth marijuana use. Using data from the National and State Youth Risk Behavior Surveys (YRBS) for the period 1991-2017, we explore the relationship between state excise taxes on cigarettes and teen marijuana use. In general, our results fail to support either of the above hypotheses. Rather, we find little evidence to suggest that teen marijuana use is sensitive to changes in the state cigarette tax. This null result holds for the sample period where cigarette taxes are observed to have the largest effect on teen cigarette use and across a number of demographic groups in the data. Finally, we find preliminary evidence that the recent adoption of state e-cigarette taxes is associated with a reduction in youth marijuana use.
26780.zh_abstract: 香烟税对青少年大麻使用的溢出效应一直是公众激烈辩论的主题。香烟税的反对者警告说，增税会导致青少年转向大麻。另一方面，公共卫生专家经常声称，由于烟草是一种“入门”毒品，更高的香烟税将阻止青少年使用大麻。利用1991-2017年期间全国和州级青少年风险行为调查的数据，我们探讨了州级香烟消费税与青少年大麻使用之间的关系。总体而言，我们的结果未能支持上述任何一种假设。相反，我们几乎没有发现证据表明青少年大麻使用对州香烟税的变化敏感。这一零结果在观察到香烟税对青少年吸烟影响最大的样本期内以及数据中的多个人口群体中均成立。最后，我们初步发现，近期州级电子烟税的采用与青少年大麻使用的减少有关。

26779.title: Drinking and Driving
26779.abstract: Driving while intoxicated causes many traffic accidents and deaths. Two decisions are closely related, whether to engage in heavy drinking, and to drive, conditional on heavy drinking. This paper reviews the extensive literature on heavy drinking, addiction, and driving after heavy drinking. Relevant public policies involve a combination of deterrence, incapacitation, and treatment. While there is empirical support for the rational addiction model applied to heavy drinking, some attributes of drinker-drivers differ from others (e.g., impulsivity in domains other than alcohol consumption, hyperbolic discounting). Policies most effective in reducing drinking and driving are alcohol excise taxes, minimum drinking age and zero tolerance laws for underage persons, dram shop and social host liability, and criminal sanctions overall. Empirical studies have not determined which specific criminal sanctions are most effective. A major impediment to criminal sanctions as a deterrent is that the probability of being stopped/arrested when driving while intoxicated is extremely low, < 0.01 to 0.02 at most, further reduced by probability of conviction/sentencing following stop/arrest far below 1. Incarceration lengths tend to be too short to incapacitate people from drinking and driving. Alcohol treatment’s effectiveness is limited by low treatment rates among persons for whom treatment is appropriate.
26779.zh_abstract: 酒后驾驶导致许多交通事故和死亡。两个密切相关的决策是：是否进行重度饮酒，以及在重度饮酒后是否驾驶。本文回顾了关于重度饮酒、成瘾以及酒后驾驶的广泛文献。相关的公共政策涉及威慑、限制能力和治疗的组合。虽然理性成瘾模型应用于重度饮酒得到了实证支持，但饮酒驾驶者的一些属性与其他人群不同（例如，在酒精消费以外的领域存在冲动性、双曲线贴现）。在减少酒后驾驶方面最有效的政策是酒精消费税、最低饮酒年龄和针对未成年人的零容忍法律、酒类销售场所和社会招待责任，以及整体刑事制裁。实证研究尚未确定哪些具体的刑事制裁最为有效。刑事制裁作为威慑的一个主要障碍是，酒后驾驶时被拦截/逮捕的概率极低，最多低于0.01至0.02，并且由于拦截/逮捕后的定罪/判刑概率远低于1，这一概率进一步降低。监禁期限往往过短，无法有效限制人们酒后驾驶。酒精治疗的有效性受到适合治疗人群低治疗率的限制。

26778.title: Forward Guidance and Household Expectations
26778.authors: Olivier Coibion, Dimitris Georgarakos, Yuriy Gorodnichenko, Michael Weber
26778.abstract: We compare the causal effects of forward guidance communication about future interest rates on households’ expectations of inflation, mortgage rates, and unemployment to the effects of communication about future inflation in a randomized controlled trial using more than 25,000 U.S. individuals in the Nielsen Homescan panel. We elicit individuals’ expectations and then provide 22 different forms of information regarding past, current and/or future inflation and interest rates. Information treatments about current and next year’s interest rates have a strong effect on household expectations but treatments beyond one year do not have any additional impact on forecasts. Exogenous variation in inflation expectations transmits into other expectations. The richness of our survey allows us to better understand how individuals form expectations about macroeconomic variables jointly and the non-response to long-run forward guidance is consistent with models in which agents have constrained capacity to collect and process information.
26778.zh_abstract: 我们在一项随机对照试验中，利用Nielsen Homescan面板中超过25,000名美国个体，比较了关于未来利率的前瞻指引沟通与关于未来通胀的沟通对家庭通胀、抵押贷款利率和失业预期的因果效应。我们引出个体的预期，然后提供22种关于过去、当前和/或未来通胀及利率的不同信息形式。关于当前和明年利率的信息处理对家庭预期有强烈影响，但超过一年的处理对预测没有任何额外影响。通胀预期的外生变化会传导至其他预期。我们调查的丰富性使我们能够更好地理解个体如何共同形成对宏观经济变量的预期，以及对长期前瞻指引的无反应与代理人收集和处理信息能力受限的模型一致。
26778.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, ME；JEL：C83, D84, E31

26777.title: Anti-Bullying Laws and Suicidal Behaviors among Teenagers
26777.zh_title: 反欺凌法与青少年自杀行为
26777.authors: Daniel I. Rees, Joseph J. Sabia, Gokhan Kumpas
26777.abstract: The CDC reports that the association between bullying and suicides among teenagers has generated “concern, even panic,” but polices aimed at combatting bullying have received little attention from researchers. Using a difference-in-differences estimation strategy, we find that state-level anti-bullying laws (ABLs) reduce bullying victimization, depression and suicidal ideation, with the largest estimated effects for female teenagers and teenagers who identify as lesbian, gay, bisexual, or questioning. In addition, ABLs are associated with a 13-16 percent reduction in the suicide rate of female 14- through 18-year-olds. Event-study analyses and falsification tests provide evidence that these estimates can be interpreted causally.
26777.zh_abstract: 美国疾病控制与预防中心报告称，欺凌与青少年自杀之间的关联已引发“担忧，甚至恐慌”，但旨在打击欺凌的政策很少受到研究者的关注。使用双重差分估计策略，我们发现州级反欺凌法减少了欺凌受害、抑郁和自杀意念，对女性青少年以及自认为是女同性恋、男同性恋、双性恋或性取向不确定的青少年估计效应最大。此外，反欺凌法与14至18岁女性青少年自杀率降低13-16%相关。事件研究分析和安慰剂检验提供了证据，表明这些估计可以解释为因果关系。

26776.title: Digitization and Pre-Purchase Information: The Causal and Welfare Impacts of Reviews and Crowd Ratings
26776.zh_title: 数字化与购买前信息：评论和大众评级的因果及福利影响
26776.abstract: Digitization has led to product proliferation, straining traditional institutions for product discovery; but digitization has also spawned crowd-based rating systems. We compare the relative impacts of professional critics and crowd-based Amazon star ratings on consumer welfare in book publishing. We assemble data on daily Amazon sales ranks, star ratings, and prices for thousands of books in 2018, along with information on their professional reviews in several major outlets. Using various fixed effects and discontinuity-based empirical strategies, we estimate that a New York Times review raises estimated sales by 78 percent during the first five days following a review; and the elasticity of sales with respect to an Amazon star is about 0.75. We use these causal estimates to calibrate structural models of demand for measuring the welfare impact of pre-purchase information in a way that respects the distinction between ex ante and ex post utility. The aggregate effect of star ratings on consumer surplus is roughly 15 times the effect of traditional review outlets. Crowd-based information now accounts for the vast majority of pre-purchase information, but the absolute effects of professional reviews have not declined over time.
26776.zh_abstract: 数字化导致了产品激增，给传统的产品发现机制带来了压力；但数字化也催生了基于大众的评级系统。我们比较了专业评论家和基于大众的亚马逊星级评分对图书出版中消费者福利的相对影响。我们收集了2018年数千本书的每日亚马逊销售排名、星级评分和价格数据，以及它们在几个主要媒体上的专业评论信息。使用各种固定效应和基于断点的实证策略，我们估计《纽约时报》的评论在评论发布后的前五天内使估计销售额增加78%；而销售对亚马逊星级的弹性约为0.75。我们利用这些因果估计来校准需求的结构模型，以衡量购买前信息对福利的影响，同时尊重事前和事后效用之间的区别。星级评分对消费者剩余的总影响大约是传统评论渠道影响的15倍。基于大众的信息现在占购买前信息的绝大部分，但专业评论的绝对影响并未随时间下降。

26775.title: Advance Market Commitments: Insights from Theory and Experience
26775.zh_title: 预先市场承诺：来自理论与经验的见解
26775.authors: Michael Kremer, Jonathan D. Levin, Christopher M. Snyder
26775.abstract: Ten years ago, donors committed $\$1.5$ billion to a pilot Advance Market Commitment (AMC) to help purchase pneumococcal vaccine for low-income countries. The AMC aimed to encourage the development of such vaccines, ensure distribution to children in low-income countries, and pilot the AMC mechanism for possible future use. Three vaccines have been developed and more than 150 million children immunized, saving an estimated 700,000 lives. This paper reviews the economic logic behind AMCs, the experience with the pilot, and key issues for future AMCs.
26775.zh_abstract: 十年前，捐助者承诺投入15亿美元用于一项试点预先市场承诺，以帮助为低收入国家购买肺炎球菌疫苗。该预先市场承诺旨在鼓励此类疫苗的开发，确保向低收入国家儿童分发疫苗，并为未来可能的使用试点预先市场承诺机制。已有三种疫苗被开发出来，超过1.5亿儿童接种了疫苗，估计挽救了70万人的生命。本文回顾了预先市场承诺背后的经济逻辑、试点的经验以及未来预先市场承诺的关键问题。
26775.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, EH, IO, LE, PE, POL, PR；JEL：I15, L65, O38

26774.title: Does Race Matter for Police Use of Force? Evidence from 911 Calls
26774.zh_title: 种族对警察使用武力有影响吗？来自911电话的证据
26774.abstract: While there is much concern about the role of race in police use of force, identifying causal effects is difficult. This is in part because of selection, and in part because researchers often observe only interactions that end in use of force, necessitating nontrivial benchmarking assumptions. This paper addresses these problems by using data on officers dispatched to over 2 million 911 calls in two cities, neither of which allows for discretion in the dispatch process. Using a location-by-time fixed effects approach that isolates the random variation in officer race, we show white officers use force 60 percent more than black officers, and use gun force twice as often. To examine how civilian race affects use of force, we compare how white officers increase use of force as they are dispatched to more minority neighborhoods, compared to minority officers. Perhaps most strikingly, we show that while white and black officers use gun force at similar rates in white and racially mixed neighborhoods, white officers are five times as likely to use gun force in predominantly black neighborhoods. Similarly, white officers increase use of any force much more than minority officers when dispatched to more minority neighborhoods. Consequently, difference-in-differences estimates from individual officer fixed effect models indicate black (Hispanic) civilians are 30 - 60 (75 - 120) percent more likely to experience any use of force, and five times as likely to experience gun use of force, compared to if white officers scaled up force similarly to minority officers. These findings highlight race as an important determinant of police use of force, including and especially lethal force.
26774.zh_abstract: 尽管人们非常关注种族在警察使用武力中的作用，但识别因果效应是困难的。这部分是由于选择性问题，部分是由于研究者通常只观察到以使用武力告终的互动，这需要非平凡的基准假设。本文通过使用两个城市超过200万个911电话中派遣警员的数据来解决这些问题，这两个城市的派遣过程都不允许自由裁量权。使用地点-时间固定效应方法，该方法隔离了警员种族的随机变异，我们显示白人警员使用武力的频率比黑人警员高60%，使用枪支武力的频率高一倍。为了考察平民种族如何影响武力使用，我们比较了白人警员在派遣到更多少数族裔社区时武力使用的增加情况，与少数族裔警员相比。也许最引人注目的是，我们显示，虽然白人警员和黑人警员在白人和种族混合社区使用枪支武力的比率相似，但在以黑人为主的社区，白人警员使用枪支武力的可能性是前者的五倍。同样，当派遣到更多少数族裔社区时，白人警员使用任何武力的增加幅度远大于少数族裔警员。因此，来自个体警员固定效应模型的双重差分估计表明，与少数族裔警员以类似方式增加武力相比，黑人（西班牙裔）平民经历任何武力使用的可能性高出30-60%（75-120%），经历枪支武力使用的可能性高出五倍。这些发现突显了种族是警察使用武力的重要决定因素，包括尤其是致命武力。

26773.title: Beyond Basis Basics: Liquidity Demand and Deviations from the Law of One Price
26773.zh_title: 超越基差基础：流动性需求与一价定律的偏离
26773.authors: Todd M. Hazelkorn, Tobias J. Moskowitz, Kaushik Vasudevan
26773.abstract: We argue that deviations from the law of one price between futures and spot prices, known as bases, capture important information about liquidity demand for equity market exposure in global equity index futures markets. We show that bases (1) co-move with dealer and investor futures positions, (2) are contemporaneously positively correlated with spot and futures markets with the same sign, and (3) negatively predict futures and spot market returns with the same sign. These findings are uniquely consistent with our liquidity demand model and distinct from other explanations for bases, such as arbitrage opportunities or intermediary balance sheet costs. We show persistent supply-demand imbalances for equity index exposure reflected in bases, where compensation for meeting liquidity demand for that exposure is large (5-6% annual premium).
26773.zh_abstract: 我们认为，期货与现货价格之间的一价定律偏离（即基差）捕捉了全球股指期货市场中股票市场敞口流动性需求的重要信息。我们证明基差：(1) 与交易商和投资者的期货头寸共同变动；(2) 与现货和期货市场同期正相关且符号一致；(3) 负向预测期货和现货市场回报且符号一致。这些发现与我们的流动性需求模型唯一一致，并区别于其他对基差的解释，例如套利机会或中介资产负债表成本。我们显示，基差反映了对股指敞口的持续供需失衡，其中满足该敞口流动性需求的补偿是巨大的（年化溢价5-6%）。
26773.meta: Programs：AP, IFM；JEL：F3, F31, F65, G1, G13, G15, G2, G23

26772.title: Confirmatory Bias in Health Decisions: Evidence from the MMR-Autism Controversy
26772.zh_title: 健康决策中的确认偏误：来自MMR-自闭症争议的证据
26772.authors: Mengcen Qian, Shin-Yi Chou, Ernest K. Lai
26772.abstract: Since Wakefield et al. (1998), the public was exposed to mixed information surrounding the claim that measles-mumps-rubella vaccine causes autism. A persistent trend to delay the vaccination during 1998–2011 in the US was driven by children of college-educated mothers, suggesting that these mothers held biases against the vaccine influenced by the early unfounded claim. Consistent with confirmatory bias, exposures to negative information about the vaccine strengthened their biases more than exposures to positive information attenuated them. Positive online information, however, had strong impacts on vaccination decisions, suggesting that online dissemination of vaccine-safety information may help tackle the sticky misinformation.
26772.zh_abstract: 自Wakefield等人（1998年）以来，公众接触到了关于麻疹-腮腺炎-风疹疫苗导致自闭症这一说法的混杂信息。1998年至2011年间，美国延迟接种疫苗的持续趋势主要由受过大学教育的母亲的孩子驱动，这表明这些母亲受到了早期无根据说法的影响，对疫苗持有偏见。与确认偏误一致，接触疫苗的负面信息强化了她们的偏见，其程度超过了正面信息削弱偏见的效果。然而，正面的在线信息对接种决策产生了强烈影响，这表明在线传播疫苗安全信息可能有助于应对顽固的错误信息。

26771.title: Information Acquisition, Efficiency, and Non-Fundamental Volatility
26771.zh_title: 信息获取、效率与非基本面波动
26771.abstract: We analyze non-fundamental volatility and efficiency in large games featuring strategic interaction and endogenous information acquisition. We adopt the rational inattention approach to information acquisition but generalize to a large class of information costs. Agents can learn about exogenous states as well as endogenous aggregate actions. We study how properties of information costs relate to properties of equilibria. We provide necessary and sufficient conditions to guarantee zero non-fundamental volatility in equilibrium and another set of necessary and sufficient conditions to guarantee constrained efficient equilibria. Mutual information, the cost typically assumed in rational inattention models, precludes non-fundamental volatility and imposes efficiency.
26771.zh_abstract: 我们分析了具有战略互动和内生化信息获取的大型博弈中的非基本面波动和效率。我们采用理性疏忽方法进行信息获取，但将其推广到一大类信息成本。代理人可以学习外生状态以及内生的总体行动。我们研究信息成本的性质如何与均衡的性质相关联。我们提供了保证均衡中非基本面波动为零的充分必要条件，以及另一组保证约束有效均衡的充分必要条件。互信息（理性疏忽模型中通常假设的成本）排除了非基本面波动并施加了效率。

26770.title: A Method to Construct Geographical Crosswalks with an Application to US Counties since 1790
26770.zh_title: 一种构建地理交叉对照表的方法：以1790年以来美国县级数据为例
26770.authors: Fabian Eckert, Andrés Gvirtz, Jack Liang, Michael Peters
26770.abstract: Empirical researchers often have to map data provided for a "reporting" spatial unit, say counties in 1900, to a "reference" one, say, counties in 2010. We discuss a general method to create such crosswalks: computing the share of the area of each reporting unit nested in a given reference unit. Using these shares, data can be re-aggregated from the reporting to the reference units. We apply the method to construct a crosswalk for US county-level data since 1790 to present-day counties or commuting zones. We also provide the code to generate other crosswalks given maps of reporting and reference units.
26770.zh_abstract: 实证研究人员经常需要将按“报告”空间单元（例如1900年的县）提供的数据映射到“参考”空间单元（例如2010年的县）。我们讨论了一种创建此类交叉对照表的通用方法：计算每个报告单元嵌套在给定参考单元中的面积份额。利用这些份额，数据可以从报告单元重新汇总到参考单元。我们将该方法应用于构建自1790年以来美国县级数据到现今县或通勤区的交叉对照表。我们还提供了代码，以便在给定报告和参考单元地图的情况下生成其他交叉对照表。

26769.title: Medicaid Physician Fees and Access to Care among Children with Special Health Care Needs
26769.zh_title: 医疗补助医生费用与特殊医疗需求儿童的医疗可及性
26769.authors: Pinka Chatterji, Sandra Decker, Jason U. Huh
26769.abstract: The objective of this study is to use data from the National Survey of Children with Special Health Care Needs (NS-CSHCN) to test whether Medicaid physician fees are correlated with access to health services and adequacy of insurance coverage among CSHCN. We use a difference-in-differences method, comparing the effects of Medicaid physician fees on outcomes of publicly-insured children in states that raised fees vs. in states that did not. We also consider a triple difference specification using privately-insured children as the comparison group. Our findings indicate that raising the Medicaid primary care fee level close to at least 90 percent of the Medicare level reduces the likelihood that publicly-insured CSHCN lack a usual source of care in a doctor’s office by about 15 percent. Fee increases are also associated with improved access to specialty doctor care, and large improvements in caregivers’ satisfaction with the adequacy of health insurance coverage, among publicly-insured CSHCN. Results for some other access measures, such as global measures of having difficulties and delays accessing services, were mixed.
26769.zh_abstract: 本研究的目的是利用全国特殊医疗需求儿童调查数据，检验医疗补助医生费用是否与特殊医疗需求儿童获得医疗服务的可及性及保险覆盖的充分性相关。我们采用双重差分方法，比较提高医生费用的州与未提高的州中公共保险儿童的结果。我们还使用私人保险儿童作为对照组，采用三重差分设定。我们的发现表明，将医疗补助初级保健费用水平提高到至少接近医疗保险水平的90%，可将公共保险特殊医疗需求儿童缺乏医生办公室常规护理来源的可能性降低约15%。费用增加还与公共保险特殊医疗需求儿童获得专科医生护理的可及性改善，以及护理人员对健康保险覆盖充分性满意度的显著提高相关。对于其他一些可及性指标，例如获得服务困难和延迟的总体指标，结果则不一。

26768.title: Uncertainty Shocks and Business Cycle Research
26768.zh_title: 不确定性冲击与商业周期研究
26768.abstract: We review the literature on uncertainty shocks and business cycle research. First, we motivate the study of uncertainty shocks by documenting the presence of time-variation in the volatility of macroeconomic time series. Second, we enumerate the mechanisms that researchers have postulated to link uncertainty shocks and business cycles. Third, we outline how we can specify uncertainty shocks. Fourth, we postulate a real business cycle model augmented with financial frictions and uncertainty shocks. Fifth, we use the model to illustrate our previous discussions and to show how uncertainty shocks can be expansionary.
26768.zh_abstract: 我们回顾了关于不确定性冲击与商业周期研究的文献。首先，我们通过记录宏观经济时间序列波动性的时变性来激励对不确定性冲击的研究。其次，我们列举了研究者提出的将不确定性冲击与商业周期联系起来的机制。第三，我们概述了如何设定不确定性冲击。第四，我们提出了一个用金融摩擦和不确定性冲击增强的真实商业周期模型。第五，我们使用该模型来说明我们之前的讨论，并展示不确定性冲击如何具有扩张性。

26799.title: The Secured Credit Premium and the Issuance of Secured Debt
26799.zh_title: 担保债务溢价与担保债务发行
26799.authors: Efraim Benmelech, Nitish Kumar, Raghuram Rajan
26799.abstract: Credit spreads for secured debt are lower than for unsecured debt, especially when a firm’s credit quality deteriorates, the economy slows, or average credit spreads widen. Yet investment grade firms tend to be reluctant to issue secured debt at all times. In contrast, we find that for firms that are rated below-investment grade, the likelihood of secured debt issuance increases as firm’s credit quality deteriorates, the economy slows, or average credit spreads widen. This differential pattern of issue behavior is consistent with highly rated firms seeing unencumbered collateral as a form of insurance, to be used only in extremis.
26799.zh_abstract: 担保债务的信用利差低于无担保债务，尤其是在公司信用质量恶化、经济放缓或平均信用利差扩大时。然而，投资级公司往往在任何时候都不愿发行担保债务。相反，我们发现，对于评级低于投资级的公司，随着公司信用质量恶化、经济放缓或平均信用利差扩大，发行担保债务的可能性增加。这种发行行为的差异模式与高评级公司将未抵押的抵押品视为一种保险形式，仅在极端情况下使用是一致的。
26799.meta: Programs：AP, CF, ME；JEL：E44, E51, G21, G23, G33

26798.title: Global Macro-Financial Cycles and Spillovers
26798.zh_title: 全球宏观金融周期与溢出效应
26798.authors: Jongrim Ha, M. Ayhan Kose, Christopher Otrok, Eswar S. Prasad
26798.abstract: We develop a new dynamic factor model that allows us to jointly characterize global macroeconomic and financial cycles and the spillovers between them. The model decomposes macroeconomic cycles into the part driven by global and country-specific macro factors and the part driven by spillovers from financial variables. We consider cycles in macroeconomic aggregates (output, consumption, and investment) and financial variables (equity and house prices, and interest rates). We find that the global macro factor plays a major role in explaining G-7 business cycles, but there are also spillovers from equity and house price shocks onto macroeconomic aggregates. These spillovers operate mainly through the global macro factor rather than the country-specific macro factors (i.e., these spillovers affect business cycles in all G-7 economies) and are stronger in the period leading up to and following the global financial crisis. We find little evidence of spillovers from macroeconomic cycles to financial cycles.
26798.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一个新的动态因子模型，使我们能够共同刻画全球宏观经济和金融周期以及它们之间的溢出效应。该模型将宏观经济周期分解为由全球和国家特定宏观因子驱动的部分，以及由金融变量溢出驱动的部分。我们考虑宏观经济总量（产出、消费和投资）和金融变量（股票和房价以及利率）的周期。我们发现，全球宏观因子在解释七国集团商业周期中起着主要作用，但也存在股票和房价冲击对宏观经济总量的溢出效应。这些溢出效应主要通过全球宏观因子而非国家特定宏观因子运作（即这些溢出效应影响所有七国集团经济体的商业周期），并且在全球金融危机前后时期更为强烈。我们几乎没有发现宏观经济周期向金融周期溢出的证据。

26797.title: Uncovered Interest Parity, Forward Guidance, and the Exchange Rate
26797.zh_title: 未抛补利率平价、前瞻指引与汇率
26797.abstract: Under uncovered interest parity (UIP), the size of the effect on the real exchange rate of an anticipated change in real interest rate differentials is invariant to the horizon at which the change is expected. Empirical evidence using US, euro area and UK data points to a substantial deviation from that invariance prediction: expectations of interest rate differentials in the near (distant) future are shown to have much larger (smaller) effects on the real exchange rate than is implied by UIP. Some possible explanations are discussed.
26797.zh_abstract: 根据未抛补利率平价（UIP），实际利率差预期变化对实际汇率的影响大小，与预期变化发生的期限无关。使用美国、欧元区和英国数据的实证证据表明，该不变性预测存在显著偏离：近期（远期）利率差预期对实际汇率的影响远大于（小于）UIP所隐含的程度。本文讨论了一些可能的解释。

26796.title: Monetary Policy and Bubbles in a New Keynesian Model with Overlapping Generations
26796.zh_title: 具有世代交叠的新凯恩斯模型中的货币政策与泡沫
26796.abstract: I analyze an extension of the New Keynesian model that features overlapping generations of finitely-lived agents and (stochastic) transitions to inactivity. In contrast with the standard model, the proposed framework allows for the existence of rational expectations equilibria with asset price bubbles. I study the conditions under which bubble-driven fluctuations may emerge and the type of monetary policy rules that may prevent them. I conclude by discussing some of the model's welfare implications.
26796.zh_abstract: 我分析了一个新凯恩斯模型的扩展版本，该模型包含有限生命代理人的世代交叠以及（随机的）非活跃状态转换。与标准模型相比，所提出的框架允许存在具有资产价格泡沫的理性预期均衡。我研究了泡沫驱动波动可能出现的条件，以及可能防止此类波动的货币政策规则类型。最后，我讨论了该模型的一些福利含义。

26795.title: Random-Coefficients Logit Demand Estimation with Zero-Valued Market Shares
26795.zh_title: 零市场份额下的随机系数Logit需求估计
26795.authors: Jean-Pierre H. Dubé, Ali Hortaçsu, Joonhwi Joo
26795.abstract: Although typically overlooked, many purchase datasets exhibit a high incidence of products with zero sales. We propose a new estimator for the Random-Coefficients Logit demand system for purchase datasets with zero-valued market shares. The identification of the demand parameters is based on a pairwise-differencing approach that constructs moment conditions based on differences in demand between pairs of products. The corresponding estimator corrects non-parametrically for the potential selection of the incidence of zeros on unobserved aspects of demand. The estimator also corrects for the potential endogeneity of marketing variables both in demand and in the selection propensities. Monte Carlo simulations show that our proposed estimator provides reliable small-sample inference both with and without selection-on- unobservables. In an empirical case study, the proposed estimator not only generates different demand estimates than approaches that ignore selection in the incidence of zero shares, it also generates better out-of-sample fit of observed retail contribution margins.
26795.zh_abstract: 尽管通常被忽视，许多购买数据集显示出产品零销售的高发生率。我们针对具有零市场份额的购买数据集，提出了一种新的随机系数Logit需求系统估计量。需求参数的识别基于一种成对差分方法，该方法根据产品对之间的需求差异构建矩条件。相应的估计量以非参数方式校正了零发生率在需求未观测方面可能存在的选择偏差。该估计量还校正了营销变量在需求和选择倾向性中可能存在的内生性。蒙特卡洛模拟表明，我们提出的估计量在存在和不存在未观测因素选择的情况下，都能提供可靠的小样本推断。在一个实证案例研究中，所提出的估计量不仅产生了与忽略零份额发生率选择的方法不同的需求估计，而且在样本外对观测到的零售贡献利润率的拟合效果更好。

26794.title: Intertemporal Price Discrimination in Sequential Quantity-Price Games
26794.zh_title: 序贯数量-价格博弈中的跨期价格歧视
26794.authors: James D. Dana Jr., Kevin R. Williams
26794.abstract: This paper develops an oligopoly model in which firms first choose capacity and then compete in prices in a series of advance-purchase markets. We show that when the elasticity of demand falls across periods, strong competitive forces prevent firms from utilizing intertemporal price discrimination. We then enrich the model by allowing firms to use inventory controls, or sales limits assigned to individual prices. We show that competing firms can profitably use inventory controls. Thus, although typically viewed as a tool to manage demand uncertainty, we show that inventory controls can also facilitate price discrimination in oligopoly.
26794.zh_abstract: 本文构建了一个寡头垄断模型，其中企业首先选择产能，然后在一系列预售市场中展开价格竞争。我们表明，当需求弹性随时间下降时，强大的竞争力量阻止了企业利用跨期价格歧视。然后，我们通过允许企业使用库存控制（即分配给单个价格的销售限额）来丰富模型。我们表明，竞争企业可以有利可图地使用库存控制。因此，尽管库存控制通常被视为管理需求不确定性的工具，但我们表明，它在寡头垄断中也能促进价格歧视。

26793.title: The Financial Center Leverage Cycle: Does it Spread Around the World?
26793.zh_title: 金融中心杠杆周期：它是否在全球蔓延？
26793.authors: Graciela L. Kaminsky, Leandro Medina, Shiyi Wang
26793.abstract: With a novel database, we examine the evolution of capital flows to the periphery since the collapse of the Bretton Woods System in the early 1970s. We decompose capital flows into global, regional, and idiosyncratic factors. In contrast to previous findings, which mostly use data from the 2000s, we find that booms and busts in capital flows are mainly explained by regional factors and not the global factor. We then ask, what drives these regional factors. Is it the leverage cycle in the financial center? What triggers the leverage cycle in the financial center? Is it a change in global investors’ risk appetite? Or, is it a change in the demand for capital in the periphery? We link leverage in the financial center to regional capital flows and the cost of borrowing in international capital markets to answer these questions. Our estimations indicate that regional capital flows are driven by supply shocks. Interestingly, we find that the leverage in the financial center has a time-varying behavior, with a movement away from lending to the emerging periphery in the 1970s to the 1990s towards lending to the advanced periphery in the 2000s.
26793.zh_abstract: 利用一个新颖的数据库，我们考察了自20世纪70年代初布雷顿森林体系崩溃以来资本流向外围经济体的演变。我们将资本流动分解为全球因素、区域因素和特质因素。与先前主要使用2000年代数据的发现相反，我们发现资本流动的繁荣与衰退主要由区域因素而非全球因素解释。然后我们追问，是什么驱动了这些区域因素？是金融中心的杠杆周期吗？是什么触发了金融中心的杠杆周期？是全球投资者风险偏好的变化，还是外围经济体资本需求的变化？我们将金融中心的杠杆与区域资本流动以及国际资本市场的借贷成本联系起来，以回答这些问题。我们的估计表明，区域资本流动是由供给冲击驱动的。有趣的是，我们发现金融中心的杠杆具有时变行为，从20世纪70年代至90年代向新兴外围经济体的贷款，转向了21世纪向发达外围经济体的贷款。

26792.title: The Collateral Channel of Monetary Policy: Evidence from China
26792.zh_title: 货币政策的抵押品渠道：来自中国的证据
26792.authors: Hanming Fang, Yongqin Wang, Xian Wu
26792.abstract: Collateral-based monetary policy tools have been used extensively by major central banks. Lack of proper policy counterfactuals, however, makes it difficult to empirically identify their causal effects on the financial market and the real economy. We exploit a quasi-natural experiment in China, where dual-listed bonds are traded in two mostly segmented markets: the interbank market regulated by the Central Bank, and the exchange market regulated by the securities regulator. During a policy shift in our study period, China's Central Bank included a class of previously ineligible bonds in the interbank market to become eligible collateral for financial institutions to borrow money from its Medium-Term Lending Facility (MLF). This policy shift allows us to implement a triple-difference strategy to estimate the causal impact of the collateral-based unconventional monetary policy. We find that in the secondary market the policy reduced the spreads of the newly collateralizable bonds in the treatment market (the interbank market) by 42-62 basis points. We also find that there is a pass-through effect from the secondary market to the primary market: the spreads of the treated bonds newly issued in the interbank market were reduced by 54 basis points.
26792.zh_abstract: 基于抵押品的货币政策工具已被各大央行广泛使用。然而，缺乏适当的政策反事实，使得难以通过实证识别其对金融市场和实体经济的因果效应。我们利用中国的一个准自然实验，其中双重上市债券在两个基本分割的市场交易：由中央银行监管的银行间市场，以及由证券监管机构监管的交易所市场。在我们研究期间的一次政策转变中，中国央行将一类此前在银行间市场不合格的债券纳入合格抵押品范围，允许金融机构从中期借贷便利（MLF）借款。这一政策转变使我们能够采用三重差分策略来估计基于抵押品的非常规货币政策的因果影响。我们发现，在二级市场，该政策使处理市场（银行间市场）中新成为合格抵押品的债券的利差降低了42-62个基点。我们还发现存在从二级市场到一级市场的传导效应：在银行间市场新发行的处理债券的利差降低了54个基点。
26792.meta: Programs：AP, IFM, ME；JEL：E44, E52, E58, G12

26791.title: 21st Century Macro
26791.abstract: In the 21st century, many key macroeconomic variables in the developed world have been persistently low, including inflation, output, growth, interest rates (both real and nominal), and labor share. I consider a class of standard representative agent rational expectations models in which fundamentals are deterministic and constant over time. I show that for any level of nominal frictions (no matter how small) and for any monetary policy rule (regardless of how active), there is a large set of stochastic equilibria that exhibit permanently low inflation, low output, low labor share, and low nominal interest rates. If the Phillips curve is sufficiently flat, then these equilibria also exhibit low growth and real interest rates.
26791.zh_abstract: 在21世纪，发达世界的许多关键宏观经济变量持续低迷，包括通胀、产出、增长、利率（实际和名义）以及劳动份额。我考虑了一类标准的代表性代理人理性预期模型，其中基本面是确定性的且随时间恒定。我表明，对于任何名义摩擦程度（无论多小）和任何货币政策规则（无论多积极），都存在一个大的随机均衡集合，这些均衡表现出持续的低通胀、低产出、低劳动份额和低名义利率。如果菲利普斯曲线足够平坦，那么这些均衡还表现出低增长和低实际利率。

26790.title: How do U.S. Visa Policies Affect Unauthorized Immigration?
26790.zh_title: 美国签证政策如何影响非法移民？
26790.abstract: We examine how increasing the number of visas available to potential migrants would affect unauthorized immigration from Mexico to the U.S. Current U.S. policy bans people who are deported from receiving legal status for a period of time. This policy aims to serve as an additional deterrent to unauthorized immigration, but may be ineffective given that most potential Mexican migrants have an extremely low probability of ever being able to legally move to the U.S. We develop a dynamic discrete location choice model, which we estimate using data from the Mexican Migration Project, and consider various counterfactual policies that vary the intensity of enforcement and access to work visas. We find that legal entry bans for deported individuals are ineffective at current rates of legal immigration, but that increased legalization rates would amplify the deterrent effects of deportation. We also show that a temporary work visa program would yield similar deterrent effects as an increase in permanent legalization without resulting in very large increases in the total stock of migrants residing in the U.S. These findings have important implications for structuring future immigration reforms.
26790.zh_abstract: 我们研究了增加潜在移民可获得的签证数量将如何影响从墨西哥到美国的非法移民。美国现行政策禁止被驱逐出境的人在一段时间内获得合法身份。该政策旨在作为对非法移民的额外威慑，但可能无效，因为大多数潜在的墨西哥移民能够合法移居美国的概率极低。我们开发了一个动态离散区位选择模型，并使用墨西哥移民项目的数据进行估计，然后考虑了各种改变执法力度和工作签证获取途径的反事实政策。我们发现，在当前的合法移民率下，对被驱逐者的入境禁令无效，但提高合法化率会放大驱逐的威慑效果。我们还表明，临时工作签证计划会产生与增加永久合法化类似的威慑效果，而不会导致居住在美国的移民总存量大幅增加。这些发现对未来移民改革的结构设计具有重要意义。

26789.title: Take the Q Train: Value Capture of Public Infrastructure Projects
26789.zh_title: 乘坐Q线：公共交通基础设施项目的价值捕获
26789.authors: Arpit Gupta, Stijn Van Nieuwerburgh, Constantine Kontokosta
26789.abstract: Transit infrastructure is a critical asset for economic activity yet costly to build in dense urban environments. We measure the benefit of the Second Avenue Subway extension in New York City, the most expensive urban transit infrastructure project in recent memory, by analyzing local real estate prices which capitalize the benefits of transit spillovers. We find 8% price increases, creating $\$6$ billion in new property value. Using cell phone ping data, we document substantial reductions in commuting time especially among subway users, offering a plausible mechanism for the price gains. The increase in prices reflects both higher rents and lower risk. Infrastructure improvements lower the riskiness of real estate investments. Only 30% of the private value created by the subway is captured through higher property tax revenue, and is insufficient to cover the cost of the subway. Targeted property tax increases may help governments capture more of the value created, and serve as a useful funding tool.
26789.zh_abstract: 交通基础设施是经济活动的重要资产，但在密集的城市环境中建设成本高昂。我们通过分析当地房地产价格（这些价格资本化了交通溢出效应的收益）来衡量纽约市第二大道地铁延伸线的效益，这是近期最昂贵的城市交通基础设施项目。我们发现房价上涨了8%，创造了60亿美元的新房产价值。利用手机定位数据，我们记录了通勤时间的大幅减少，尤其是地铁用户，这为价格上涨提供了一个合理的机制。价格上涨既反映了更高的租金，也反映了更低的风险。基础设施改善降低了房地产投资的风险。地铁创造的私人价值中，只有30%通过更高的房产税收入被捕获，不足以覆盖地铁的成本。有针对性的房产税增加可能有助于政府捕获更多创造的价值，并作为一种有用的融资工具。
26789.meta: Programs：AP, CF, PE；JEL：G10, G18, G5, R3, R38, R41, R42

26788.title: Across-Country Wage Compression in Multinationals
26788.zh_title: 跨国公司的跨国工资压缩
26788.authors: Jonas Hjort, Xuan Li, Heather Sarsons
26788.abstract: Many employers link wages at establishments outside of the home region to the level at headquarters. We show this using new data on 1,200 multinationals’ establishments across the world and linked employee-level data on their establishments in Brazil. Headquarters wage changes arising from minimum wage and exchange rate shocks are partially transmitted to workers employed in the same position abroad. Wage change transmission appears to be direct and results from firm-wide wage-setting procedures rather than associated technology or employment changes. “Anchored” wage-setting is somewhat associated with particular characteristics of the job×employer×headquarter-establishment country-pair.
26788.zh_abstract: 许多雇主将总部以外分支机构的工资与总部水平挂钩。我们利用全球1200家跨国公司分支机构的新数据以及其在巴西分支机构的关联员工层面数据证明了这一点。由最低工资和汇率冲击引起的总部工资变化会部分传导给在国外同一职位工作的员工。工资变化的传导似乎是直接的，并且源于公司范围内的工资制定程序，而非相关的技术或就业变化。“锚定”工资制定在一定程度上与特定工作×雇主×总部-分支机构国家对的特定特征相关。

26787.title: Does Student Loan Forgiveness Drive Disability Application?
26787.zh_title: 学生贷款减免是否会推动残疾申请？
26787.abstract: Student loan debt in the US exceeds $\$1.3$ trillion, and unlike credit card and medical debt, typically cannot be discharged through bankruptcy. Moreover, this debt has been increasing: the share of borrowers leaving school with more than $\$50,000$ of federal student debt increased from 2 percent in 1992 to 17 percent in 2014. However, federal student loan debt discharge is available for disabled individuals through the Department of Education's Total and Permanent Disability Discharge (TPDD) mechanism through certification of a total and permanent disability. In July 2013, the TPDD expanded to include receipt of Social Security Disability Insurance (SSDI) or Supplemental Security Income (SSI) as an eligible category for discharge, provided medical improvement was not expected. Using data from the Survey of Income and Program Participation (SIPP) matched to SSI and SSDI applications, we find that SSDI and SSI application rates increased among respondents with student loans relative to rates among those without student loans. Our estimates suggest the policy change raised the probability of applying for SSDI or SSI in a given quarter among student loan-holders by 50% (baseline rate per quarter is approximately 0.3%), generally increasing SSI and SSDI awards. However, these induced award recipients were unlikely to receive the disability designation necessary to obtain student loan discharge. Given that the geographic distributions of student loan indebtedness and historical SSDI/SSI program participation differ, there are strong implications for both the size and location of SSDI and SSI beneficiaries. Furthermore, these findings highlight the importance of learning from policy changes in programs that interact with SSDI and SSI to better understand the drivers of disability program participation.
26787.zh_abstract: 美国的学生贷款债务超过1.3万亿美元，与信用卡和医疗债务不同，通常不能通过破产免除。此外，这种债务一直在增加：离校时联邦学生债务超过5万美元的借款人比例从1992年的2%增加到2014年的17%。然而，残疾个人可以通过教育部的完全和永久性残疾解除机制，在证明完全和永久性残疾后获得联邦学生贷款债务的免除。2013年7月，TPDD扩大到包括领取社会保障残疾保险或补充保障收入作为符合条件的免除类别，前提是预计不会出现医疗改善。利用与SSI和SSDI申请相匹配的收入与项目参与调查数据，我们发现，与没有学生贷款的受访者相比，有学生贷款的受访者的SSDI和SSI申请率有所上升。我们的估计表明，这项政策变化使学生贷款持有者在特定季度申请SSDI或SSI的概率提高了50%（每季度基线率约为0.3%），总体上增加了SSI和SSDI的授予。然而，这些被诱导的福利领取者不太可能获得获得学生贷款免除所需的残疾认定。鉴于学生贷款负债的地理分布与历史SSDI/SSI项目参与率不同，这对SSDI和SSI受益人的规模和地点都有重要影响。此外，这些发现强调了从与SSDI和SSI相互作用的项目政策变化中学习的重要性，以更好地理解残疾项目参与的驱动因素。
26787.meta: Programs：PE；JEL：D14, H52, H81, I22, I38, J14

26786.title: Between Firm Changes in Earnings Inequality: The Dominant Role of Industry Effects
26786.zh_title: 企业间收入不平等的变化：行业效应的主导作用
26786.authors: John C. Haltiwanger, James R. Spletzer
26786.abstract: We find that most of the rising between firm earnings inequality that dominates the overall increase in inequality in the U.S. is accounted for by industry effects. These industry effects stem from rising inter-industry earnings differentials and not from changing distribution of employment across industries. We also find the rising inter-industry earnings differentials are almost completely accounted for by occupation effects. These results link together the key findings from separate components of the recent literature: one focuses on firm effects and the other on occupation effects. The link via industry effects challenges conventional wisdom.
26786.zh_abstract: 我们发现，在美国总体不平等加剧中占主导地位的、不断上升的企业间收入不平等，大部分是由行业效应造成的。这些行业效应源于不断上升的行业间收入差异，而非就业在行业间分布的变化。我们还发现，不断上升的行业间收入差异几乎完全由职业效应解释。这些结果将近期文献中不同组成部分的关键发现联系起来：一个关注企业效应，另一个关注职业效应。通过行业效应建立的这种联系挑战了传统观点。
26786.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, PR；JEL：E24, J24, J31, L22

26785.title: The Role of Heterogeneous Risk Preferences, Discount Rates, and Earnings Expectations in College Major Choice
26785.zh_title: 异质性风险偏好、贴现率和收入预期在大学专业选择中的作用
26785.authors: Arpita Patnaik, Joanna Venator, Matthew Wiswall, Basit Zafar
26785.abstract: In this paper, we estimate a rich model of college major choice using a panel of experimentally-derived data. Our estimation strategy combines two types of data: data on self-reported beliefs about future earnings from potential human capital decisions and survey-based measures of risk and time preferences. We show how to use these data to identify a general life-cycle model, allowing for rich patterns of heterogeneous beliefs and preferences. Our data allow us to separate perceptions about the degree of risk or perceptions about the current versus future payoffs for a choice from the individual's preference for risk and patience. Comparing our estimates of the general model to estimates of models which ignore heterogeneity in risk and time preferences, we find that these restricted models are likely to overstate the importance of earnings to major choice. Additionally, we show that while men are less risk averse and patient than women, gender differences in expectations about own-earnings, risk aversion, and patience cannot explain gender gaps in major choice.
26785.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们利用一组通过实验得出的面板数据估计了一个丰富的大学专业选择模型。我们的估计策略结合了两种类型的数据：关于潜在人力资本决策未来收入的自报信念数据，以及基于调查的风险和时间偏好度量。我们展示了如何利用这些数据来识别一个一般生命周期模型，允许丰富的异质性信念和偏好模式。我们的数据使我们能够将个人对风险或当前与未来回报的感知，与个人的风险偏好和耐心分离开来。将我们对一般模型的估计与忽略风险和时间偏好异质性的模型估计进行比较，我们发现这些受限模型可能夸大了收入对专业选择的重要性。此外，我们表明，虽然男性比女性更不厌恶风险且更缺乏耐心，但男性和女性在自身收入预期、风险厌恶和耐心方面的差异无法解释专业选择中的性别差距。

26784.title: Can Low Retirement Savings Be Rationalized?
26784.zh_title: 低退休储蓄能否被合理化？
26784.authors: Jason S. Scott, John B. Shoven, Sita N. Slavov, John G. Watson
26784.abstract: Simple presentations of the life cycle model often suggest a constant level of real consumption in retirement. Similarly, financial planners commonly suggest that people save for retirement in such a way as to enable them to maintain a level retirement standard of living equal to their standard of living while working. However, constant consumption with age is only optimal under the precise and unlikely condition that the subjective rate of time preference is equal to the real interest rate. Most people exhibit a positive rate of pure time preference and additionally discount the future by both mortality and morbidity risks. In comparison, the real interest rate is roughly zero percent and the term structure of interest rates suggests that this condition is likely to persist. These considerations suggest that optimal consumption in the life cycle model declines with age. This finding has major implications for optimal retirement saving. For instance, we find that for many, perhaps most, people in the bottom half of the lifetime earnings distribution, it is optimal to spend out their retirement wealth well before death and to live on Social Security alone after that. Very low earners may find it optimal to not engage in retirement saving at all.
26784.zh_abstract: 生命周期模型的简单表述通常建议退休后实际消费水平保持不变。同样，理财规划师通常建议人们为退休储蓄，以便能够维持与工作时相同水平的退休生活标准。然而，消费随年龄保持不变只有在主观时间偏好率等于实际利率这一精确且不太可能的条件下才是最优的。大多数人表现出正的时间偏好率，并且还会因死亡率和发病率风险而对未来进行额外贴现。相比之下，实际利率大约为零，利率期限结构表明这种情况可能持续。这些考虑表明，生命周期模型中的最优消费随年龄增长而下降。这一发现对最优退休储蓄具有重大影响。例如，我们发现，对于许多（也许是大多数）处于终生收入分配下半部分的人来说，最优选择是在去世前花光退休财富，之后仅靠社会保障生活。收入非常低的人可能会发现完全不进行退休储蓄是最优的。

26783.title: The Cost of Convenience: Ridehailing and Traffic Fatalities
26783.zh_title: 便利的代价：网约车与交通死亡事故
26783.authors: John M. Barrios, Yael Hochberg, Hanyi Yi
26783.abstract: We examine the effect of the introduction of ridehailing in U.S. cities on fatal traffic accidents. The arrival of ridehailing is associated with an increase of approximately 3% in the number of fatalities and fatal accidents, for both vehicle occupants and pedestrians. The effects persist when controlling for proxies for smartphone adoption patterns. Consistent with ridehailing increasing congestion and road usage, we find that introduction is associated with an increase in arterial vehicle miles traveled, excess gas consumption, and annual hours of delay in traffic. On the extensive margin, ridehailing’s arrival is also associated with an increase in new car registrations. These effects are higher in cities with prior higher use of public transportation and carpools, consistent with a substitution effect, and in larger cities. These effects persist over time. Back-of-the-envelope estimates of the annual cost in human lives range from $\$5.33$B to $\$13.24$B.
26783.zh_abstract: 我们研究了美国城市引入网约车对致命交通事故的影响。网约车的出现与死亡人数和致命事故数量（包括车辆乘员和行人）增加约3%相关。在控制智能手机采用模式的代理变量后，这些影响仍然存在。与网约车增加拥堵和道路使用一致，我们发现网约车的引入与主干道车辆行驶里程增加、额外汽油消耗以及交通延误年小时数增加相关。在广泛边际上，网约车的出现也与新车注册量增加相关。这些影响在之前公共交通和拼车使用率较高的城市以及较大的城市中更高，这与替代效应一致。这些影响随时间持续存在。粗略估计的年度人类生命成本范围在53.3亿美元到132.4亿美元之间。
